# Data Model: mos_target_mangatarget_parquet


MOS Target Table: mangatarget


## Contents
- [Basic Information](#basic-information)
- [Changelog](#changelog)
- [Example DATAFRAME List](#example-dataframe-list)
- [Notes](#notes)
- [Regrets](#regrets)
---

## Basic Information
MaNGA Target Catalog

### Naming Convention
$MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_mangatarget.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

### Releases
DR20

### Enviroments
MOS_TARGET

### Approximate Size
19 MB

### File Type
PARQUET

### Generated by Product
sdss5db targeting database.

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
2.3.3

### DATAFRAME List for release DR20
- Primary data frame.

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

---
## Example DATAFRAME List

### Columns


#### catalog_ra

- Column Name: catalog_ra
- Description: Right Ascension of measured object center (J2000) as given in the input catalog (NSA for main samples and most ancillaries)
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### catalog_dec

- Column Name: catalog_dec
- Description: Declination of measured object center (J2000) as given in the input catalog (NSA for main samples and most ancillaries)
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### nsa_z

- Column Name: nsa_z
- Description: Heliocentric redshift (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_zdist

- Column Name: nsa_zdist
- Description: Distance estimate using pecular velocity model of Willick et al. (1997), expressed as a redshift equivalent; multiply by c/H0 for Mpc (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_mass

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_mass
- Description: Stellar mass from K-correction fit (use with caution) for elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: solar masses
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_absmag_f

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_absmag_f
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame GALEX far-UV, from elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_absmag_n

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_absmag_n
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame GALEX near-UV, from elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_absmag_u

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_absmag_u
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS u-band, from elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_absmag_g

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_absmag_g
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS g-band, from elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_absmag_r

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_absmag_r
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS r-band, from elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_absmag_i

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_absmag_i
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS i-band, from elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_absmag_z

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_absmag_z
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS z-band, from elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_amivar_f

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_amivar_f
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_elpetro_absmag_f (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_amivar_n

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_amivar_n
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_elpetro_absmag_n (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_amivar_u

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_amivar_u
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_elpetro_absmag_u (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_amivar_g

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_amivar_g
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_elpetro_absmag_g (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_amivar_r

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_amivar_r
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_elpetro_absmag_r (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_amivar_i

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_amivar_i
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_elpetro_absmag_i (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_amivar_z

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_amivar_z
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_elpetro_absmag_z (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_f

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_f
- Description: Elliptical SDSS-style Petrosian flux in GALEX far-UV (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_n

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_n
- Description: Elliptical SDSS-style Petrosian flux in GALEX near-UV (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_u

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_u
- Description: Elliptical SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS u-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_g

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_g
- Description: Elliptical SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS g-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_r

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_r
- Description: Elliptical SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS r-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_i

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_i
- Description: Elliptical SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS i-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_z

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_z
- Description: Elliptical SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS z-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_f

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_f
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_elpetro_flux_f (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_n

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_n
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_elpetro_flux_n (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_u

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_u
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_elpetro_flux_u (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_g

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_g
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_elpetro_flux_g (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_r

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_r
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_elpetro_flux_r (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_i

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_i
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_elpetro_flux_i (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_z

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_z
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_elpetro_flux_z (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_th50_r_original

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_th50_r_original
- Description: Elliptical Petrosian 50% light radius in SDSS r-band (NSA)
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_th50_f

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_th50_f
- Description: Elliptical Petrosian 50% light radius in GALEX far-UV (NSA)
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_th50_n

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_th50_n
- Description: Elliptical Petrosian 50% light radius in GALEX near-UV (NSA)
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_th50_u

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_th50_u
- Description: Elliptical Petrosian 50% light radius in SDSS u-band (NSA)
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_th50_g

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_th50_g
- Description: Elliptical Petrosian 50% light radius in SDSS g-band (NSA)
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_th50_r

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_th50_r
- Description: Elliptical Petrosian 50% light radius in SDSS r-band (NSA)
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_th50_i

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_th50_i
- Description: Elliptical Petrosian 50% light radius in SDSS i-band (NSA)
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_th50_z

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_th50_z
- Description: Elliptical Petrosian 50% light radius in SDSS z-band (NSA)
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_phi

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_phi
- Description: Position angle (east of north) used for elliptical apertures (for this version, same as ba90) (NSA)
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_ba

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_ba
- Description: Axis ratio used for elliptical apertures (for this version, same as ba90) (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_mass

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_mass
- Description: Stellar mass from K-correction fit (use with caution) for Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: solar mass
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_absmag_f

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_absmag_f
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame GALEX near-UV, from Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_absmag_n

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_absmag_n
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame GALEX far-UV, from Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_absmag_u

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_absmag_u
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS u-band, from Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_absmag_g

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_absmag_g
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS g-band, from Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_absmag_r

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_absmag_r
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS r-band, from Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_absmag_i

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_absmag_i
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS i-band, from Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_absmag_z

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_absmag_z
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS z-band, from Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_amivar_f

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_amivar_f
- Description: Inverse variance in nsa_sersic_absmag_f (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_amivar_n

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_amivar_n
- Description: Inverse variance in nsa_sersic_absmag_n (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_amivar_u

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_amivar_u
- Description: Inverse variance in nsa_sersic_absmag_u (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_amivar_g

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_amivar_g
- Description: Inverse variance in nsa_sersic_absmag_g (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_amivar_r

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_amivar_r
- Description: Inverse variance in nsa_sersic_absmag_r (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_amivar_i

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_amivar_i
- Description: Inverse variance in nsa_sersic_absmag_i (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_amivar_z

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_amivar_z
- Description: Inverse variance in nsa_sersic_absmag_z (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_f

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_f
- Description: Two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit flux in GALEX far-UV (fit using r-band structural parameters) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_n

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_n
- Description: Two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit flux in GALEX near-UV (fit using r-band structural parameters) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_u

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_u
- Description: Two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit flux in SDSS u-band (fit using r-band structural parameters) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_g

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_g
- Description: Two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit flux in SDSS g-band (fit using r-band structural parameters) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_r

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_r
- Description: Two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit flux in SDSS r-band (fit using r-band structural parameters) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_i

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_i
- Description: Two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit flux in SDSS i-band (fit using r-band structural parameters) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_z

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_z
- Description: Two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit flux in SDSS z-band (fit using r-band structural parameters) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_f

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_f
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_sersic_flux_f (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_n

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_n
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_sersic_flux_n (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_u

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_u
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_sersic_flux_u (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_g

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_g
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_sersic_flux_g (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_r

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_r
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_sersic_flux_r (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_i

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_i
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_sersic_flux_i (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_z

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_z
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_sersic_flux_z (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_th50

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_th50
- Description: 50% light radius of two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit to r-band (NSA)
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_phi

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_phi
- Description: Angle (E of N) of major axis in two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit in r-band (NSA)
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_ba

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_ba
- Description: Axis ratio b/a from two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit in r-band (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_n

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_n
- Description: Sersic index from two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit in r-band (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_f

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_f
- Description: Azimuthally-averaged SDSS-style Petrosian flux in GALEX far-UV (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_n

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_n
- Description: Azimuthally-averaged SDSS-style Petrosian flux in GALEX far-UV (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_u

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_u
- Description: Azimuthally-averaged SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS u-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_g

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_g
- Description: Azimuthally-averaged SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS g-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_r

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_r
- Description: Azimuthally-averaged SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS r-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_i

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_i
- Description: Azimuthally-averaged SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS i-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_z

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_z
- Description: Azimuthally-averaged SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS z-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_ivar_f

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_ivar_f
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_petro_flux_f (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_ivar_n

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_ivar_n
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_petro_flux_n (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_ivar_u

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_ivar_u
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_petro_flux_u (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_ivar_g

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_ivar_g
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_petro_flux_g (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_ivar_r

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_ivar_r
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_petro_flux_r (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_ivar_i

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_ivar_i
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_petro_flux_i (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_ivar_z

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_ivar_z
- Description: Inverse variance of nsa_petro_flux_z (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_th50

- Column Name: nsa_petro_th50
- Description: Azimuthally averaged SDSS-style Petrosian 50% light radius (derived from r band) (NSA)
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_extinction_f

- Column Name: nsa_extinction_f
- Description: Galactic extinction from Schlegel, Finkbeiner, and Davis (1997), in GALEX far-UV (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_extinction_n

- Column Name: nsa_extinction_n
- Description: Galactic extinction from Schlegel, Finkbeiner, and Davis (1997), in GALEX near-UV (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_extinction_u

- Column Name: nsa_extinction_u
- Description: Galactic extinction from Schlegel, Finkbeiner, and Davis (1997), in SDSS u-band (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_extinction_g

- Column Name: nsa_extinction_g
- Description: Galactic extinction from Schlegel, Finkbeiner, and Davis (1997), in SDSS g-band (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_extinction_r

- Column Name: nsa_extinction_r
- Description: Galactic extinction from Schlegel, Finkbeiner, and Davis (1997), in SDSS r-band (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_extinction_i

- Column Name: nsa_extinction_i
- Description: Galactic extinction from Schlegel, Finkbeiner, and Davis (1997), in SDSS i-band (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_extinction_z

- Column Name: nsa_extinction_z
- Description: Galactic extinction from Schlegel, Finkbeiner, and Davis (1997), in SDSS z-band (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_iauname

- Column Name: nsa_iauname
- Description: IAU-style designation based on RA/Dec (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### nsa_subdir

- Column Name: nsa_subdir
- Description: Subdirectory for images in the NSA 'detect' directory (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### nsa_pid

- Column Name: nsa_pid
- Description: Parent id within mosaic for this object (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### nsa_nsaid

- Column Name: nsa_nsaid
- Description: Unique ID within NSA v1 catalog (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### catind

- Column Name: catind
- Description: Zero-indexed row within the input NSA v1 catalog (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### manga_target1

- Column Name: manga_target1
- Description: Targeting bitmask for main sample targets
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### mangaid

- Column Name: mangaid
- Description: Unique ID for each manga target
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### zmin

- Column Name: zmin
- Description: The minimum redshift at which the galaxy could still have been included in the Primary sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### zmax

- Column Name: zmax
- Description: The maximum redshift at which the galaxy could still have been included in the Primary sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### szmin

- Column Name: szmin
- Description: The minimum redshift at which the galaxy could still have been included in the Secondary sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### szmax

- Column Name: szmax
- Description: The maximum redshift at which the galaxy could still have been included in the Secondary sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### ezmin

- Column Name: ezmin
- Description: The minimum redshift at which the galaxy could still have been included in the Primary+ sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### ezmax

- Column Name: ezmax
- Description: The minimum redshift at which the galaxy could still have been included in the Primary+ sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### probs

- Column Name: probs
- Description: The probability that a Secondary sample galaxy is included after down-sampling. For galaxies not in the Secondary sample PROBS is set to the mean down-sampling probability
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### pweight

- Column Name: pweight
- Description: The volume weight for the Primary sample. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### sweight

- Column Name: sweight
- Description: The volume weight for the full Secondary sample. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### srweight

- Column Name: srweight
- Description: The volume weight for the down-sampled Secondary sample. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### eweight

- Column Name: eweight
- Description: The volume weight for the Primary+ sample. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### psrweight

- Column Name: psrweight
- Description: The volume weight for the combined Primary and down-sampled Secondary samples. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### esrweight

- Column Name: esrweight
- Description: The volume weight for the combined Primary+ and down-sampled Secondary samples. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### psweight

- Column Name: psweight
- Description: The volume weight for the combined Primary and full Secondary samples. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### esweight

- Column Name: esweight
- Description: The volume weight for the combined Primary+ and full Secondary samples. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### ranflag

- Column Name: ranflag
- Description: Set to 1 if a target is to be included after random sampling to produce the correct proportions of each sample, otherwise 0
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Extension('arrow.opaque', Binary, '{"type_name": "bit", "vendor_name": "PostgreSQL"}')

- Description: IDs of all tiles that overlap a galaxy's position.

- Data Type: Int32

#### manga_tileid

- Column Name: manga_tileid
- Description: The ID of the tile to which this object has been allocated
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### tilera

- Column Name: tilera
- Description: The Right Ascension (J2000) of the tile to which this object has been allocated
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### tiledec

- Column Name: tiledec
- Description: The Declination (J2000) of the tile to which this object has been allocated
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### ifutargetsize

- Column Name: ifutargetsize
- Description: The ideal IFU size for this object. The intended IFU size is equal to IFUTargetSize except if IFUTargetSize &gt; 127 when it is 127, or &lt; 19 when it is 19
- Unit: fibers
- Data Type: Int16


#### ifudesignsize

- Column Name: ifudesignsize
- Description: The allocated IFU size (0 = "unallocated")
- Unit: fibers
- Data Type: Int16


#### ifudesignwrongsize

- Column Name: ifudesignwrongsize
- Description: The allocated IFU size if the intended IFU size was not available
- Unit: fibers
- Data Type: Int16


#### ifu_ra

- Column Name: ifu_ra
- Description: The Right Ascension (J2000) of the IFU center
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### ifu_dec

- Column Name: ifu_dec
- Description: The Right Declination (J2000) of the IFU center
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### badphotflag

- Column Name: badphotflag
- Description: Set to 1 if target has been visually inspected to have bad photometry and should not be observed
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Extension('arrow.opaque', Binary, '{"type_name": "bit", "vendor_name": "PostgreSQL"}')


#### starflag

- Column Name: starflag
- Description: Set to 1 if target lies close to a bright star should not be observed
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Extension('arrow.opaque', Binary, '{"type_name": "bit", "vendor_name": "PostgreSQL"}')


#### object_ra

- Column Name: object_ra
- Description: The best estimate of the Right Ascension (J2000) of the center of the object. Normally the same as CATALOG_RA but can be modified particularly as a result of visual inspection
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### object_dec

- Column Name: object_dec
- Description: The best estimate of the Declination (J2000) of the center of the object. Normally the same as CATALOG_RA but can be modified particularly as a result of visual inspection
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### obsflag

- Column Name: obsflag
- Description: Set to 1 if the target has already been included on a plate set to be observed at the time the IFU allocation was made, otherwise 0
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Extension('arrow.opaque', Binary, '{"type_name": "bit", "vendor_name": "PostgreSQL"}')


#### catindanc

- Column Name: catindanc
- Description: Zero-indexed row within the applicable ancillary catalog
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### ifudesignsizemain

- Column Name: ifudesignsizemain
- Description: The allocated IFU size prior to the addition of the ancillary samples (0 = "unallocated")
- Unit: fibers
- Data Type: Int16


#### ifuminsizeanc

- Column Name: ifuminsizeanc
- Description: The minimum acceptable IFU size for the ancillary program
- Unit: fibers
- Data Type: Int16


#### ifutargsizeanc

- Column Name: ifutargsizeanc
- Description: The ideal IFU size for the ancillary program
- Unit: fibers
- Data Type: Int16


#### manga_target3

- Column Name: manga_target3
- Description: Targeting bitmask for the ancillary samples
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### priorityanc

- Column Name: priorityanc
- Description: The ancillary program's priority for this object
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### unalloc

- Column Name: unalloc
- Description: Set to 1 if an ancillary target has been allocated an IFU the was not allocated to a main sample galaxy, otherwise 0
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int16


#### specobjid

- Column Name: specobjid
- Description: The associated specObjID from the dr20_sdss_dr17_specobj table
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


---
## Notes
None

## Regrets
I  have no regrets!
